forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 53. West wind around 9 mph.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny. High near 71, with temperatures falling to around 69 in the afternoon. West northwest wind 7 to 10 mph.

weather_report:
Tonight in Downtown San Francisco, the sky carries a gentle touch of clouds, adding a soft, dreamy quality to the atmosphere as the temperature dips to a cozy 53 degrees. A light breeze from the west brushes through the streets, inviting a sense of calm and coolness, perfect for wrapping oneself in a light jacket or sweater if venturing out. As the night deepens, the city lights twinkle softly like distant stars scattered across a velvet canvas.

Yesterday’s sun will give way to a vibrant Saturday, where golden rays touch the earth and bring warmth. Expect a peak around 71 degrees, although the afternoon may soothe the heat with a slight dip. The sky will be largely clear, with only whispers of clouds overhead, offering panoramic views of the iconic skyline and the distant hills. The west-northwest winds will playfully sway the flags and trees, invigorating the air with a refreshing crispness. This is a day perfectly suited for leisurely explorations—perhaps a stroll through a quiet neighborhood, a visit to a local café where the aroma of freshly brewed coffee lingers enticingly, or simply basking on a park bench, indulging in a good book. Dress comfortably and light, yet carry a light layer; it’s San Francisco, after all, where the temperature can dance unpredictably even in the sun’s embrace.
